blended.narrative: Lookout Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 13 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,895 ft. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
